patch.value: Settings read cache: memoize readSettingsWithMetadata across the 3-5 reads per command

Biggest remaining per-command perf lever (code-quality audit F1): readSettingsWithMetadata is re-read+validated+merged+schema-loaded 3-5x per command (~9 FS syscalls each). DESIGN CONSTRAINTS: must key the cache on settings.json AND schema/*.json mtimes (schema files change independently via pm schema commands -> a settings.json-only key serves stale schema), keep onRead hooks firing each call, stay correct for the long-lived MCP server (external edits), and invalidate on writeSettings. Add a small tested src/core/store module to vitest include at 100%.
